// Negative fixture for spec 120 R6 scan (a): a NEW call of a
// workspace composition helper that is absent from the audited
// allowlist. The scan must flag it as UNAUDITED.
package fixture

import (
	"github.com/mrmaxsteel/mindspec/internal/workspace"
)

func newHelperCall(beadID string) (string, error) {
	// This brand-new call site is not in compositionCallAllowlist.
	return workspace.BeadBranch(beadID)
}
